Our story

Care that comes from nature,
made for pets.

Krypto Pet Care brings together everything your pet needs — natural rawhide chews and bones, herbal grooming, dog biscuits and imported accessories for cats and dogs. We focus on one thing: quality you can trust, for pets of every breed and age.

Paraben free

No harsh parabens — gentle on sensitive skin.

Sulphate free

Cleans without stripping your pet's natural coat.

All breeds & ages

Gentle on every coat, breed and age.

Made in India

Proudly manufactured for pets across the country.

Dog chews & treats

Rawhide treats dogs love

Made from rawhide, rice starch and food-grade colour — rich in protein, calcium, vitamins, carbohydrates and iron. Treat to nourish dogs of all ages.

Classic chewy sticks that keep dogs happily occupied while supporting healthy teeth.

Herbal grooming

Healthy skin, a coat that shines

Plant-powered shampoos that protect, soothe and nourish — gentle enough for puppies, kittens and pets of all breeds and ages.

Vet inspired

Anti-Tick & Anti-Itch Shampoo

Herbal protection from ticks, fleas and itching. Soothes irritation, controls lice and is antibacterial & antifungal for a healthy, shiny coat.

Enriched with
NeemEucalyptusTea Tree OilAloe Vera

2-in-1 Shampoo & Conditioner

Cleanses, conditions and nourishes in one step for a silky-smooth coat — with deep nourishment, lasting freshness, shine and strength.

Accessories & essentials

Everything for your pet, in one place

Beyond treats and grooming, we stock dog biscuits and a wide range of imported pet accessories for cats and dogs — everything that keeps your pet clean, comfortable and well looked after.

Dog Biscuits

Crunchy, wholesome biscuits dogs love.

Poop Scooper

Mess-free clean-ups, indoors or out.

Nail Cutter

Safe, sharp trimmers for tidy paws.

Slicker Brush

Detangles and de-sheds for a smooth coat.

Cat Litter Tray

Sturdy trays that keep litter contained.

Water Bottle

Spill-proof bottles for walks and travel.

Cat Scratcher

Keeps claws healthy and furniture safe.

Leashes

Comfortable, durable everyday walking leads.

Dog Collar

Adjustable collars in a range of sizes.
